name: GH_GraphicsUtil
summary: Utility class with static (Shared) functions that help with colour, shape and text rendering.

methods.name: AppendArc(Point3d, Point3d, Vector3d, GraphicsPath)
methods.signature: public static void AppendArc(Point3d p0, Point3d p1, Vector3d dir, GraphicsPath path)
methods.summary: Append an arc segment to a GraphicsPath. If the arc cannot be solved, a linear segment is appended instead.

params.name: dir
params.doc: Tangent direction at start of arc.

methods.name: AppendArc(PointF, PointF, SizeF, GraphicsPath)
methods.signature: public static void AppendArc(PointF p0, PointF p1, SizeF dir, GraphicsPath path)
methods.summary: Append an arc segment to a GraphicsPath. If the arc cannot be solved, a linear segment is appended instead.

params.name: dir
params.doc: Tangent direction at start of arc.

methods.name: BlendColour(Color, Color)
methods.signature: public static Color BlendColour(Color bottom, Color top)
methods.summary: Overlays two colours. The Alpha component of the top colour controls the blend.

returns.doc: The blended colour. Alpha channels are added together.

methods.name: BlendColour(Color, Color, Double)
methods.signature: public static Color BlendColour(Color bottom, Color top, double factor)
methods.summary: Overlays two colours.

params.name: factor
params.doc: Blend factor. 0.0 means the return colour will be identical to the bottom colour, 1.0 means the return colour will be identical to the top colour.

methods.name: BlendInteger
methods.signature: public static int BlendInteger(double t0, double t1, int a0, int a1, double t)
methods.summary: Calculates a linear blend between two extremes. Although the inputs are unlimited integers, the output is an integer in the byte range (0-255).

methods.name: BoxClosestArcPoint
methods.signature: public static PointF BoxClosestArcPoint(PointF pt, RectangleF box)
methods.summary: Find the closest point on or in a box given a test point. Arc extension is implied.

methods.name: BoxClosestPoint(Point, Rectangle)
methods.signature: public static Point BoxClosestPoint(Point pt, Rectangle box)
methods.summary: Find the closest point on or in a box given a test point.

methods.name: BoxClosestPoint(PointF, RectangleF)
methods.signature: public static PointF BoxClosestPoint(PointF pt, RectangleF box)
methods.summary: Find the closest point on or in a box given a test point.

methods.name: BoxFurthestPoint(Point, Rectangle)
methods.signature: public static Point BoxFurthestPoint(Point pt, Rectangle box)
methods.summary: Find the furthest point on or in a box given a test point.

methods.name: BoxFurthestPoint(PointF, RectangleF)
methods.signature: public static PointF BoxFurthestPoint(PointF pt, RectangleF box)
methods.summary: Find the furthest point on or in a box given a test point.

methods.name: BoxViewCone
methods.signature: public static GraphicsPath BoxViewCone(PointF pt, RectangleF box)
methods.summary: Computes the graphicspath that represents the viewcone for a point and a rectangle. If the rectangle contains the point, null is returned.

methods.name: ColourARGB(Double, Double, Double)
methods.signature: public static Color ColourARGB(double r, double g, double b)
methods.summary: Create a colour from floating ARGB channels (0.0~1.0). Channels are clipped to valid ranges.

returns.doc: The colour implied by the RGB channel values.

methods.name: ColourARGB(Int32, Int32, Int32)
methods.signature: public static Color ColourARGB(int r, int g, int b)
methods.summary: Create a colour from integer RGB channels. Channels are clipped to valid ranges.

returns.doc: Returns the colour as implied by the RGB channel values.

methods.name: ColourARGB(Int32, Int32, Int32, Int32)
methods.signature: public static Color ColourARGB(int a, int r, int g, int b)
methods.summary: Create a colour from integer ARGB channels. Channels are clipped to valid ranges.

returns.doc: Returns the colour as implied by the ARGB channel values.

methods.name: CreateColourIcon
methods.signature: public static Bitmap CreateColourIcon(int width, int height, Color colour)
methods.summary: Create a colour swatch icon.

params.name: colour
params.doc: Colour for swatch, if colour contains an alpha component, you should draw an alpha-grid behind the icon.

returns.doc: A bitmap with the requested icon colour.

methods.name: DentHorizontal(Graphics, Rectangle)
methods.signature: public static void DentHorizontal(Graphics g, Rectangle box)
methods.summary: Draws a horizontal dent. A horizontal dent had dark lines along the top and bottom edges.

methods.name: DentHorizontal(Graphics, Rectangle, Int32, Int32)
methods.signature: public static void DentHorizontal(Graphics g, Rectangle box, int alphaEdge, int alphaFill)
methods.summary: Draws a horizontal dent. A horizontal dent had dark lines along the top and bottom edges.

params.name: alphaEdge
params.doc: Transparency on the middle of the edges.

params.name: alphaFill
params.doc: Transparency on the middle of the fill.

methods.name: DentVertical(Graphics, Rectangle)
methods.signature: public static void DentVertical(Graphics g, Rectangle box)
methods.summary: Draws a vertical dent. A vertical dent had dark lines along the left and right edges.

methods.name: DentVertical(Graphics, Rectangle, Int32, Int32)
methods.signature: public static void DentVertical(Graphics g, Rectangle box, int alphaEdge, int alphaFill)
methods.summary: Draws a vertical dent. A vertical dent had dark lines along the left and right edges.

params.name: alphaEdge
params.doc: Transparency on the middle of the edges.

params.name: alphaFill
params.doc: Transparency on the middle of the fill.

methods.name: Distance
methods.signature: public static float Distance(PointF a, PointF b)
methods.summary: Compute the distance between two points.

methods.name: DistanceS
methods.signature: public static float DistanceS(PointF a, PointF b)
methods.summary: Compute the squared distance between two points.

methods.name: EtchFadingHorizontal
methods.signature: public static void EtchFadingHorizontal(Graphics g, int x0, int x1, int y, int alphaLight = 200, int alphaDark = 35)
methods.summary: Draw an etched line with fading on the extremes.

methods.name: EtchFadingVertical
methods.signature: public static void EtchFadingVertical(Graphics g, int y0, int y1, int x, int alphaLight = 200, int alphaDark = 80)
methods.summary: Draw an etched line with fading on the extremes.

methods.name: EtchHorizontal(Graphics, Single, Single, Single, Int32)
methods.signature: public static void EtchHorizontal(Graphics g, float x0, float x1, float y, int alpha = 50)
methods.summary: Draws an etched line segment.

methods.name: EtchHorizontal(Graphics, Int32, Int32, Int32, Int32, Int32)
methods.signature: public static void EtchHorizontal(Graphics g, int x0, int x1, int y, int alphaLight = 200, int alphaDark = 35)
methods.summary: Draws an etched line segment.

params.name: alphaLight
params.doc: Alpha level of etched lit line.

params.name: alphaDark
params.doc: Alpha level of etched shadow line.

methods.name: EtchVertical(Graphics, Int32, Int32, Int32, Int32)
methods.signature: public static void EtchVertical(Graphics g, int x, int y0, int y1, int alpha = 50)
methods.summary: Draws an etched line segment.

methods.name: EtchVertical(Graphics, Single, Single, Single, Int32)
methods.signature: public static void EtchVertical(Graphics g, float x, float y0, float y1, int alpha = 50)
methods.summary: Draws an etched line segment.

methods.name: FadeColour
methods.signature: public static Color FadeColour(double t0, double t1, double t, Color col)
methods.summary: Fade a colour to transparency by linearly blending a parameter between extremes.

params.name: t
params.doc: Blending factor between t0 and t1.

methods.name: ForegroundColour
methods.signature: public static Color ForegroundColour(Color col, int contrast = 30)
methods.summary: Calculates a suitable foreground color. If the background is lighter than 50%, the foreground will be darker, otherwise the foreground will be lighter.

params.name: col
params.doc: Foreground colour that works well on the given background colour.

methods.name: Grid(Graphics, RectangleF, Int32)
methods.signature: public static void Grid(Graphics g, RectangleF rec, int density)
methods.summary: Draw a default grid.

methods.name: Grid(Graphics, RectangleF, Int32, Int32)
methods.signature: public static void Grid(Graphics g, RectangleF rec, int densityX, int densityY)
methods.summary: Draw a default grid.

methods.name: Grid(Graphics, RectangleF, Int32, Int32, Color, Color)
methods.signature: public static void Grid(Graphics g, RectangleF rec, int densityX, int densityY, Color colorBg, Color colorWire)
methods.summary: Draw a grid.

params.name: colorBg
params.doc: Background colour override, the default is 30/255 white.

params.name: colorWire
params.doc: Grid line colour override, the default is 40/255 black.

methods.name: HighlightBrush
methods.signature: public static Brush HighlightBrush()
methods.summary: Gets a new brush object that can be used to draw the content of hover and focus rectangles. Caller is responsible for disposing the brush.

methods.name: HighlightPen
methods.signature: public static Pen HighlightPen()
methods.summary: Gets a new pen object that can be used to draw the edges of hover and focus rectangles. Caller is responsible for disposing the pen.

methods.name: InvertColour
methods.signature: public static Color InvertColour(Color col)
methods.summary: Computes the inverted colour. Alpha remains the same.

returns.doc: Colour where RGB channels are set to 255-C.

methods.name: IsPointInEllipse
methods.signature: public static bool IsPointInEllipse(RectangleF ellipse, PointF point)
methods.summary: Test whether a point is inside or outside an ellipse.

returns.doc: True if the point is in or on the ellipse.

methods.name: LimitInteger
methods.signature: public static void LimitInteger(ref int channel)
methods.summary: Limits the given integer to the 0~255 range.

methods.name: LimitIntegers
methods.signature: public static void LimitIntegers(ref int r, ref int g, ref int b)
methods.summary: Limits RGB channels to the 0~255 range,

methods.name: OffsetColour(Color, Int32)
methods.signature: public static Color OffsetColour(Color col, int shift)
methods.summary: Add a fixed value to all the channels in a colour.
methods.remarks: The alpha channel of the colour is not offset.

methods.name: OffsetColour(Color, Int32, Int32, Int32)
methods.signature: public static Color OffsetColour(Color col, int redShift, int greenShift, int blueShift)
methods.summary: Add a fixed value to all the channels in a colour.
methods.remarks: The alpha channel of the colour is not offset.

methods.name: RenderBalloonTag(Graphics, String, PointF, RectangleF)
methods.signature: public static void RenderBalloonTag(Graphics g, string text, PointF tip, RectangleF container)
methods.summary: Draw a default balloon tag in a container.

methods.name: RenderBalloonTag(Graphics, String, Font, PointF, RectangleF)
methods.signature: public static void RenderBalloonTag(Graphics g, string text, Font font, PointF tip, RectangleF container)
methods.summary: Draw a default balloon tag in a container with a Font override.

methods.name: RenderBalloonTag(Graphics, String, Font, Color, Color, PointF, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static void RenderBalloonTag(Graphics g, string text, Font font, Color backColor, Color foreColor, PointF tip, bool upright)
methods.summary: Draw a balloon tag in a container.

params.name: foreColor
params.doc: Foreground colour of balloon edge and text.

params.name: upright
params.doc: If true, the balloon will be above the tip point.

methods.name: RenderBalloonTag(Graphics, String, Font, Color, Color, PointF, RectangleF)
methods.signature: public static void RenderBalloonTag(Graphics g, string text, Font font, Color backColor, Color foreColor, PointF tip, RectangleF container)
methods.summary: Draw a balloon tag in a container.

params.name: foreColor
params.doc: Foreground colout of balloon edge and text.

params.name: tip
params.doc: Tip of balloon (should be inside container).

methods.name: RenderCenteredIcon(Graphics, RectangleF, Image)
methods.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("This method is obsolete, use a RenderIcon() overload instead.")] public static void RenderCenteredIcon(Graphics g, RectangleF frame, Image icon)
methods.summary: Draw an icon centered in a frame. This code is not zoom-aware, but it will perform consistent rounding (to avoid pixel-jitter when moving the frame across the screen). Icon will not be clipped to the frame.

methods.name: RenderCenteredIcon(Graphics, RectangleF, Image, Double)
methods.signature: public static void RenderCenteredIcon(Graphics g, RectangleF frame, Image icon, double alpha)
methods.summary: Draw an icon centered in a frame. This code is not zoom-aware, but it will perform consistent rounding (to avoid pixel-jitter when moving the frame across the screen). Icon will not be clipped to the frame.

methods.name: RenderCenteredIcon(Graphics, RectangleF, Image, Single)
methods.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("This method is obsolete, use a RenderIcon() overload instead.")] public static void RenderCenteredIcon(Graphics g, RectangleF frame, Image icon, float scale)
methods.summary: Draw an icon centered in a frame. This code is not zoom-aware, but it will perform consistent rounding (to avoid pixel-jitter when moving the frame across the screen). Icon will not be clipped to the frame.

methods.name: RenderCenteredText
methods.signature: public static void RenderCenteredText(Graphics g, string text, Font font, Color color, PointF center)
methods.summary: Render a bit of text centered on a point.

methods.name: RenderColourIcon(Graphics, Rectangle, Color)
methods.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("Use RenderColourIcon(Graphics, Rectangle, Color, Single) instead.")] public static void RenderColourIcon(Graphics g, Rectangle rec, Color colour)
methods.summary: Render a colour icon into a graphics context. A colour icon contains a black outer and white inner edge.

methods.name: RenderColourIcon(Graphics, Rectangle, Color, Single)
methods.signature: public static void RenderColourIcon(Graphics g, Rectangle rec, Color colour, float scale)
methods.summary: Render a colour icon into a graphics context. A colour icon contains a black outer and white inner edge.

methods.name: RenderFadedImage(Graphics, Image, Rectangle, Double)
methods.signature: public static void RenderFadedImage(Graphics graphics, Image image, Rectangle destination, double fade)
methods.summary: Render an icon into a rectangle with a specific fading factor.

methods.name: RenderFadedImage(Graphics, Image, Rectangle, Int32)
methods.signature: public static void RenderFadedImage(Graphics graphics, Image image, Rectangle destination, int alpha)
methods.summary: Render an icon into a rectangle with a specific fading factor.

methods.name: RenderHighlightBox(Graphics, Rectangle, Int32)
methods.signature: public static void RenderHighlightBox(Graphics g, Rectangle box, int cornerRadius)
methods.summary: Render a typical blueish highlight rectangle

params.name: cornerRadius
params.doc: Radius (in pixels) of box corners, use zero or less to render crisp rectangles.

methods.name: RenderHighlightBox(Graphics, Rectangle, Int32, Boolean, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static void RenderHighlightBox(Graphics g, Rectangle box, int cornerRadius, bool drawFill, bool drawEdge)
methods.summary: Render a typical blueish highlight rectangle

params.name: cornerRadius
params.doc: Radius (in pixels) of box corners, use zero or less to render crisp rectangles.

params.name: drawFill
params.doc: If true, the box fill have a blue background.

params.name: drawEdge
params.doc: If true, the box will have a blue edge.

methods.name: RenderHighlightBox(Graphics, Rectangle, Int32, Color, Color)
methods.signature: public static void RenderHighlightBox(Graphics g, Rectangle box, int cornerRadius, Color fill, Color edge)
methods.summary: Render a typical blueish highlight rectangle

params.name: cornerRadius
params.doc: Radius (in pixels) of box corners, use zero or less to render crisp rectangles.

methods.name: RenderIcon
methods.signature: public static void RenderIcon(Graphics graphics, RectangleF frame, Image icon)
methods.summary: Render an icon into a frame. The icon is positioned in the center and will be drawn at its own size multiplied by the system UiScale, provided it doesn't exceed the frame.

methods.name: RenderObjectOverlay(Graphics, IGH_DocumentObject, RectangleF)
methods.signature: public static void RenderObjectOverlay(Graphics graphics, IGH_DocumentObject obj, RectangleF target)
methods.summary: Render all overlay icons for a specific object. Overlays aren't drawn when the zoom is less than 80%

methods.name: RenderObjectOverlay(Graphics, IGH_ObjectProxy, RectangleF)
methods.signature: public static void RenderObjectOverlay(Graphics graphics, IGH_ObjectProxy obj, RectangleF target)
methods.summary: Render all overlay icons for a specific object. Overlays aren't drawn when the zoom is less than 80%

methods.name: RenderRoundBar
methods.signature: public static void RenderRoundBar(Graphics graphics, RectangleF rec, Color colour)
methods.summary: Render a cylinder shaped object with round caps.

methods.name: RenderTag
methods.signature: public static void RenderTag(Graphics g, string tag, Font font, Color backColor, Color foreColor, RectangleF frame, StringAlignment alignH, StringAlignment alignV)
methods.summary: Render a text tag into a Graphics surface.

params.name: frame
params.doc: The frame into which the tags should be aligned.

methods.name: RenderUnscaledIcon(Graphics, Image, Int32, Int32)
methods.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("This method is obsolete, use a RenderIcon() overload instead.")] public static void RenderUnscaledIcon(Graphics g, Image icon, int cx, int cy)
methods.summary: Draws an image file at 1:1 scale centered on the given coordinates.

params.name: cx
params.doc: X center of image in Graphics coordinate.

params.name: cy
params.doc: Y center of image in Graphics coordinate.

methods.name: RenderUnscaledIcon(Graphics, Image, Int32, Int32, Double)
methods.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("This method is obsolete, use a RenderIcon() overload instead.")] public static void RenderUnscaledIcon(Graphics g, Image icon, int cx, int cy, double fade)
methods.summary: Draws an image file at 1:1 scale centered on the given coordinates.

params.name: cx
params.doc: X center of image in Graphics coordinate.

params.name: cy
params.doc: Y center of image in Graphics coordinate.

methods.name: RenderVerticalString
methods.signature: public static void RenderVerticalString(Graphics g, string text, Font font, Color colour, RectangleF rec, StringFormat format)
methods.summary: Render vertical text (rotated 90 degrees counter-clockwise) within a rectangle.

methods.name: RenderWarningIcon
methods.signature: public static void RenderWarningIcon(Graphics graphics, PointF center, float radius, int alpha)
methods.summary: Render a typical warning icon into a graphics context. A warning icon is an upright yellow triangle.

methods.name: ScaleColour
methods.signature: public static Color ScaleColour(Color col, double factor)
methods.summary: Multiply the channels of a colour construct with a fixed factor.
methods.remarks: The alpha channel of the colour is not mutated.

methods.name: ShadowHorizontal(Graphics, Int32, Int32, Int32, Int32, Boolean, Color)
methods.signature: public static void ShadowHorizontal(Graphics g, int x0, int x1, int y, int size, bool below, Color color)
methods.summary: Draws a horizontal shadow edge.

params.name: below
params.doc: If true, shadow is drawn below elevation line.

methods.name: ShadowHorizontal(Graphics, Int32, Int32, Int32, Int32, Boolean, Int32)
methods.signature: public static void ShadowHorizontal(Graphics g, int x0, int x1, int y, int size = 10, bool below = true, int darkness = 50)
methods.summary: Draws a horizontal shadow edge.

params.name: below
params.doc: If true, shadow is drawn below elevation line.

params.name: darkness
params.doc: Alpha component of darkness directly underneath the edge.

methods.name: ShadowHorizontal(Graphics, Single, Single, Single, Single, Boolean, Int32)
methods.signature: public static void ShadowHorizontal(Graphics g, float x0, float x1, float y, float size = 10f, bool below = true, int darkness = 50)
methods.summary: Draws a horizontal shadow edge.

params.name: below
params.doc: If true, shadow is drawn below elevation line.

params.name: darkness
params.doc: Alpha component of darkness directly underneath the edge.

methods.name: ShadowRectangle(Graphics, Rectangle, Int32, Color)
methods.signature: public static void ShadowRectangle(Graphics g, Rectangle rec, int size, Color color)
methods.summary: Draws shadow edges on the interior of a rectangle.

methods.name: ShadowRectangle(Graphics, Rectangle, Int32, Int32)
methods.signature: public static void ShadowRectangle(Graphics g, Rectangle rec, int size = 10, int darkness = 50)
methods.summary: Draws shadow edges on the interior of a rectangle.

params.name: darkness
params.doc: Alpha component of darkness directly underneath the edge.

methods.name: ShadowVertical(Graphics, Int32, Int32, Int32, Int32, Boolean, Color)
methods.signature: public static void ShadowVertical(Graphics g, int x, int y0, int y1, int size, bool right, Color color)
methods.summary: Draws a vertical shadow edge.

params.name: right
params.doc: If true, shadow is drawn to the right of the elevated line.

methods.name: ShadowVertical(Graphics, Int32, Int32, Int32, Int32, Boolean, Int32)
methods.signature: public static void ShadowVertical(Graphics g, int x, int y0, int y1, int size = 10, bool right = true, int darkness = 50)
methods.summary: Draws a vertical shadow edge.

params.name: right
params.doc: If true, shadow is drawn to the right of the elevated line.

params.name: darkness
params.doc: Alpha component of darkness directly underneath the edge.

methods.name: ShadowVertical(Graphics, Single, Single, Single, Single, Boolean, Int32)
methods.signature: public static void ShadowVertical(Graphics g, float x, float y0, float y1, float size = 10f, bool right = true, int darkness = 50)
methods.summary: Draws a vertical shadow edge.

params.name: right
params.doc: If true, shadow is drawn to the right of the elevated line.

params.name: darkness
params.doc: Alpha component of darkness directly underneath the edge.

methods.name: SolveArc(Point3d, Point3d, Vector3d, RectangleF, Single, Single)
methods.signature: public static bool SolveArc(Point3d p0, Point3d p1, Vector3d dir, ref RectangleF box, ref float angle, ref float sweep)
methods.summary: Create a GDI circular arc definition from start-point, end-point and tangent direction.

params.name: dir
params.doc: Tangent direction at start of arc.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: SolveArc(PointF, PointF, SizeF, RectangleF, Single, Single)
methods.signature: public static bool SolveArc(PointF p0, PointF p1, SizeF dir, ref RectangleF box, ref float angle, ref float sweep)
methods.summary: Create a GDI circular arc definition from start-point, end-point and tangent direction.

params.name: dir
params.doc: Tangent direction at start of arc.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: SolveArc(Double, Double, Double, Double, Double, Double, RectangleF, Single, Single)
methods.signature: public static bool SolveArc(double p0X, double p0Y, double p1X, double p1Y, double dx, double dy, ref RectangleF box, ref float angle, ref float sweep)
methods.summary: Create a GDI circular arc definition from start-point, end-point and tangent direction.

methods.name: TransparencyMatrix(Double)
methods.signature: public static ColorMatrix TransparencyMatrix(double fade)
methods.summary: Create an image transparency matrix for a specific blending factor.

methods.name: TransparencyMatrix(Int32)
methods.signature: public static ColorMatrix TransparencyMatrix(int alpha)
methods.summary: Create an image transparency matrix for a specific blending factor.

properties.name: UiScale
properties.summary: Gets the screen-scaling factor for the entire system. Use the UiAdjust methods in the Grasshopper top level namespace (Global_Proc module) to modify integer and single values.
